name: linear-admin
description: Inspect and administer Linear through a local MCP server with explicit plan/apply workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Admin-grade Linear setup through a local GraphQL path
interface.longDescription: Inspect Linear's GraphQL schema and manage shared views, templates, and project setup through a portable local MCP server with explicit plan/apply workflows.
defaultPrompt: Create shared Linear views for a project
Post a project update through the app-token GraphQL path
Inspect the Linear GraphQL schema for a feature
